2. [Gradient](mtlearn:word/gradient) $= 4 \div 2 = $ **2**.

1. The extra cost above the fixed fee is $£14 - £4 = £10$ for 5 km.
2. [Gradient](mtlearn:word/gradient) $= 10 \div 5 = $ **£2 per km**.
